title: 8 Signs Your Phone Has Quietly Replaced Your Time With God
caption:
8 signs your phone has quietly replaced your time with God. And you haven't opened your Bible to notice.

Whoever you reach for first in the morning is quietly leading your day. If it's the feed before the Word, the podcast before the silence, the notifications before you've said good morning to God, something's already been discipling you.

The app keeps score in streaks and screen time. It isn't the one you actually answer to.

Save this one and check which of these is you.

#faith #quiettime #christianmen #manofgod #scripture #digitaldiscipline #phone
